findings.exploit_path: Set sessionStorage.adminLoggedIn=true in browser, then call /v1/admin/products
findings.repro_steps: 1) sessionStorage.setItem('adminLoggedIn','true'); 2) Call admin endpoint with non-admin token
findings.block_point: verifyAdmin() checks decoded token claims only
findings.business_impact: Client-side flag does not grant backend admin access
findings.remediation: No change required for this specific bypass path

findings.exploit_path: Alter JWT payload and replay bearer token
findings.repro_steps: 1) Decode token 2) Modify admin=true 3) Re-encode without valid signature 4) Send to admin route
findings.business_impact: Tampered JWT rejected
findings.remediation: No change required for signature-forgery rejection

findings.exploit_path: Use old token issued before admin claim removal
findings.repro_steps: 1) Obtain admin token 2) Remove admin claim server-side without revoke 3) Reuse existing token until expiry
findings.business_impact: Privilege persists until token expiration/revocation; admin actions remain possible during window
findings.remediation: Force token revocation on role change and enforce token issue-time checks against revocation time

findings.exploit_path: Replay valid admin token minted before control-plane changes
findings.repro_steps: 1) Mint admin token 2) Deploy policy changes only 3) Reuse old token
findings.business_impact: Admin route protection depends on claim state inside token, not immediate policy pull
findings.remediation: Revoke refresh tokens for affected user and verify auth_time/issued-at freshness

findings.exploit_path: Call protected route without X-Firebase-AppCheck
findings.repro_steps: 1) Send valid bearer token 2) Omit app-check header
findings.business_impact: Untrusted clients without App Check are rejected when enforcement enabled
findings.remediation: Keep APP_CHECK_ENFORCE=true in all production environments

findings.exploit_path: Send empty/garbled App Check token
findings.repro_steps: 1) Set header to empty or random string 2) Call protected endpoint
findings.business_impact: Malformed tokens rejected
findings.remediation: No change required for malformed token rejection

findings.exploit_path: Reuse same valid App Check token across scripted requests
findings.repro_steps: 1) Capture one valid token 2) Replay until token expiry
findings.business_impact: Token replay window exists; per-request binding/nonces absent
findings.remediation: Bind app-check assertions to request metadata or add replay detection cache for high-risk routes

findings.exploit_path: curl with Authorization only against protected routes
findings.repro_steps: 1) Send Bearer token 2) Omit App Check header
findings.business_impact: Basic scripted abuse blocked under enforcement
findings.remediation: No change required for this path

findings.exploit_path: Attempt to hit /v1/admin/* and skip verifyAdmin/verifyAppCheck
findings.repro_steps: Direct route invocation attempts cannot bypass Express middleware chain
findings.block_point: Router-level middleware order enforces auth chain
findings.business_impact: No route-order bypass found in current code path
findings.remediation: No change required

findings.exploit_path: Write directly to restricted collections via Firestore REST/SDK without admin claim
findings.repro_steps: Use non-admin verified token and call Firestore write endpoint
findings.block_point: Firestore rules require isAdmin() or explicit owner constraints
findings.business_impact: Non-admin direct writes to admin collections denied
findings.remediation: No change required for this path

findings.exploit_path: Set window.__USE_BACKEND_API__=false then submit order via direct Firestore path
findings.repro_steps: 1) In DevTools set window.__USE_BACKEND_API__=false 2) Trigger checkout flow 3) SDK writes to Firestore directly
findings.business_impact: Bypasses backend rate-limit/app-check/server validation for orders; falls back to client-enforced path
findings.remediation: Remove client toggle from production and hard-disable direct order writes in client code

findings.exploit_path: Submit order with total < 0
findings.repro_steps: POST /v1/orders with total=-1
findings.business_impact: Direct negative-value corruption prevented
findings.remediation: No change required for this exact case

findings.exploit_path: Submit expensive items with low total
findings.repro_steps: POST /v1/orders with items sum >> total but total >= 0
findings.business_impact: Revenue manipulation possible because server trusts client-computed totals
findings.remediation: Recompute subtotal/discount/total server-side from canonical product prices and coupon rules

findings.exploit_path: Submit huge items array constrained only by 1mb JSON body
findings.repro_steps: POST /v1/orders with large items[] and valid fields
findings.business_impact: Resource consumption and log/write amplification path remains open
findings.remediation: Enforce strict max item count, max payload fields, and per-order limits server-side

findings.exploit_path: Replay same idempotencyKey
findings.repro_steps: POST same payload twice with identical idempotencyKey
findings.block_point: Transaction checks existing doc and returns duplicate result
findings.business_impact: Exact replay prevented
findings.remediation: Keep idempotency transaction logic

findings.exploit_path: Change idempotencyKey per request and flood order creation
findings.repro_steps: Loop POST /v1/orders with unique idempotencyKey values
findings.business_impact: High-volume fraudulent or nuisance order generation remains feasible
findings.remediation: Add anti-fraud throttles by account/device/payment heuristics and distributed quota store

findings.exploit_path: Burst requests across rotated IP/UID
findings.repro_steps: Parallel requests with multiple tokens/IPs against /v1/orders
findings.business_impact: In-memory limiter does not provide cluster-wide abuse resistance
findings.remediation: Replace in-memory limiter with centralized shared store enforcement

findings.exploit_path: Create coupon with unrealistic discount value
findings.repro_steps: POST /v1/admin/coupons with discount=100000
findings.business_impact: Admin-compromised account can create catastrophic pricing rules instantly
findings.remediation: Set upper bounds and policy constraints for discount types/values

findings.exploit_path: Create same coupon code in multiple docs
findings.repro_steps: POST /v1/admin/coupons repeatedly with identical code
findings.business_impact: Ambiguous coupon resolution and inconsistent checkout outcomes
findings.remediation: Enforce unique code constraint via transactional lookup + deterministic doc id

findings.exploit_path: Patch unknown keys into settings/store
findings.repro_steps: PATCH /v1/admin/settings/store with arbitrary nested fields
findings.business_impact: Configuration poisoning and hidden feature toggles can be injected by compromised admin
findings.remediation: Implement strict allowlist schema for settings patch

findings.exploit_path: Place orders regardless of current stock
findings.repro_steps: Submit orders for out-of-stock items; no stock reservation check on order write
findings.business_impact: Overselling and fulfillment failures under load or abuse
findings.remediation: Add transactional stock reservation/decrement on authoritative inventory docs

findings.exploit_path: Reuse same signature/timestamp for repeated uploads
findings.repro_steps: 1) Request signature once 2) Replay upload with same signature until provider rejects
findings.business_impact: Media abuse and cost amplification possible within signature validity window
findings.remediation: Add server-side nonce tracking and short custom expiration policy per signature

findings.exploit_path: Send folder=../../sensitive to signature endpoint
findings.repro_steps: POST /v1/media/cloudinary-signature with malicious folder
findings.block_point: sanitizeFolder() enforces sale-zone/ prefix and regex
findings.business_impact: Folder traversal via request parameter denied
findings.remediation: No change required for this path

findings.exploit_path: Inject ../ in publicId during signing
findings.repro_steps: POST signature request with publicId containing traversal characters
findings.business_impact: Traversal-style public_id manipulation denied
findings.remediation: No change required for this exact bypass

findings.exploit_path: Request signature then upload non-image payload
findings.repro_steps: Use signed params for upload with non-image file
findings.business_impact: Server-side MIME/content policy not enforced before signing
findings.remediation: Enforce allowed MIME/resource constraints in signing payload and upload policy

findings.exploit_path: Use valid signature to upload very large file
findings.repro_steps: Acquire signature then upload oversized media directly to Cloudinary
findings.business_impact: Cost and resource abuse via unrestricted upload size at signing layer
findings.remediation: Bind max file size and upload presets/transform constraints in signing contract

findings.exploit_path: Attempt upload semantics outside expected image policy using signed params
findings.repro_steps: Use signed parameters with alternate upload behavior
findings.business_impact: Signature does not lock full upload policy at app layer
findings.remediation: Include and validate strict signed parameter set for resource type and allowed options

findings.exploit_path: Force frontend to use unsigned upload or base64 fallback
findings.repro_steps: Disable backend URL and attempt cloud upload from browser helper
findings.block_point: Upload throws when backend signature endpoint is missing
findings.business_impact: Unsigned/browser-only fallback removed from current helper
findings.remediation: No change required for this fallback path

findings.exploit_path: Limiter state reset on cold start
findings.repro_steps: Send burst after instance restart; bucket map starts empty
findings.business_impact: Abuse window opens after each cold start
findings.remediation: Move limiter state to centralized persistent store

findings.exploit_path: Distribute traffic across multiple instances
findings.repro_steps: Parallel flood from distributed workers; each instance enforces local map only
findings.business_impact: Cluster-wide effective limit is multiplied by instance count
findings.remediation: Implement distributed quota and global keys per route/actor

findings.exploit_path: Rotate uid/ip to evade key `${route}:${uid||ip}`
findings.repro_steps: Use multiple accounts or spoofed proxies to vary key dimension
findings.business_impact: Abusers can shard attack load to bypass per-key limits
findings.remediation: Apply layered constraints by account reputation, device, ASN, and global route budget

findings.exploit_path: Flood /v1/media/cloudinary-signature
findings.repro_steps: Send high-rate signature requests from distributed identities
findings.business_impact: Can generate upload capability at scale and increase downstream storage/network costs
findings.remediation: Harden media endpoint with distributed limits and stronger issuance constraints

findings.exploit_path: Flood /v1/orders under autoscale conditions
findings.repro_steps: High RPS with rotating ids and idempotency values
findings.business_impact: Order store, logs, and write budget can be exhausted under coordinated abuse
findings.remediation: Add distributed abuse controls and async intake with durable queue protection

findings.exploit_path: Trigger route error and inspect response body for stack
findings.repro_steps: Send malformed payloads to force exceptions; inspect JSON error payload
findings.block_point: Response returns message/code only, no stack field
findings.business_impact: No direct stack disclosure observed in response structure
findings.remediation: No change required for stack omission

findings.exploit_path: Force internal errors to surface raw error.message in API response
findings.repro_steps: Trigger unexpected exceptions and read `error.message` returned to client
findings.business_impact: Internal implementation details can leak through raw messages
findings.remediation: Return generic production-safe messages; keep detailed errors server-side only

findings.exploit_path: Inspect signature API response/logs for api_secret
findings.repro_steps: Call signature endpoint and inspect response and frontend code
findings.block_point: Only apiKey/cloudName/signature returned; api_secret remains server-only secret
findings.business_impact: Secret not directly exposed in API response path
findings.remediation: No change required for this specific secret leak path

findings.exploit_path: Read Firebase config from client bundle
findings.repro_steps: Open firebase-config.js in browser
findings.block_point: Configuration is public web config by design; no secret in these fields
findings.business_impact: No direct credential compromise from exposed web config alone
findings.remediation: Maintain strict backend/rules enforcement since web config is public

findings.exploit_path: Cause async route exception and look for process crash behavior
findings.repro_steps: Send malformed data repeatedly across endpoints
findings.block_point: Route-level try/catch and centralized error middleware
findings.business_impact: Unhandled promise crash path not evident in current route handlers
findings.remediation: Retain explicit try/catch wrappers for all handlers

findings.exploit_path: Query orders with searchText at high volume
findings.repro_steps: Call /v1/orders?search=... with large datasets and pagination
findings.business_impact: In-memory filtering after fetch increases CPU and causes pagination drift/underfetch
findings.remediation: Move searchable projection/index strategy server-side and avoid post-query filtering loops

findings.exploit_path: Each order creates multiple docs and logs
findings.repro_steps: Submit orders at sustained rate and observe write fan-out
findings.business_impact: Write amplification elevates cost and quota pressure under load
findings.remediation: Reduce synchronous fan-out and move non-critical logs to async pipeline

findings.exploit_path: Continuous writes to admin/suspicious/auth-failed logs without retention controls
findings.repro_steps: Sustain traffic and inspect log collection growth patterns
findings.business_impact: Long-term storage growth and query degradation risk
findings.remediation: Define retention/TTL lifecycle for operational log collections

findings.exploit_path: Use combined filters uid+status+date range with sort
findings.repro_steps: Call /v1/orders with multi-filter combinations not guaranteed by provided index set
findings.business_impact: Query failures or degraded behavior under certain filter combinations
findings.remediation: Add composite indexes for all production filter combinations used by route

findings.exploit_path: High-cardinality keys trigger O(n) cleanup on each hit
findings.repro_steps: Send many unique keys and inspect per-request limiter overhead
findings.business_impact: Limiter itself becomes a CPU hotspot during key-cardinality attacks
findings.remediation: Use bounded/segmented eviction strategy with centralized limiter backend
